# Shopkarro
> Pakistan's premium handcrafted furniture store with Cash on Delivery nationwide.

- Domain: shopkarro.com
- Phone: 03706905835
- Email: shopkarro.ecom@gmail.com
- Payment: COD (Cash on Delivery) only — no advance payment required
- Delivery: Nationwide Pakistan
- Cities: Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan and 30+ more cities
- Returns: 7-day hassle-free returns
- Quality: Every piece inspected before dispatch
- Working Hours: Mon-Sat, 9am-6pm PKT

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://shopkarro.com/): Browse latest collections and featured furniture.
- [All Collections](https://shopkarro.com/categories): Browse all furniture categories.
- [Hand Painted Furniture](https://shopkarro.com/categories/hand-painted-furniture): Artisan hand-painted furniture collections.
- [Console Tables](https://shopkarro.com/furniture/console): Hand-painted and carved console tables for entryways.
- [Jaye Namaz Box](https://shopkarro.com/furniture/jaye-namaz-box): Hand-painted decorative Jaye Namaz boxes.
- [Shoe Racks](https://shopkarro.com/furniture/shoe-racks): Premium shoe rack furniture.
- [Study Tables](https://shopkarro.com/furniture/study-tables): Study and work tables.
- [Cart](https://shopkarro.com/cart): View and manage your shopping cart.
- [Checkout](https://shopkarro.com/checkout): Place your order with Cash on Delivery.
- [My Orders](https://shopkarro.com/my-orders): Track your orders and view purchase history.
- [Login](https://shopkarro.com/login): Sign in to your Shopkarro account.
- [Signup](https://shopkarro.com/signup): Create a free account to track orders.
- [FAQ](https://shopkarro.com/faqs): Frequently asked questions.

## Active Product Categories
- Console Tables (Hand Painted): Artisan hand-painted console tables for entryways, hallways, living rooms, bedrooms and home offices
- Jaye Namaz Box (Hand Painted): Decorative hand-painted Jaye Namaz boxes
- Shoe Racks: Premium quality shoe rack furniture
- Study Tables: Study and work tables for home and office

## Console Table Products
All console tables: 48in Length x 16in Width x 32in Height
Cash on Delivery available. Delivers in 2-3 business days to Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad and Multan.

- **Royal Amber Console Table** — Rs. 28,000 (Sale from Rs. 30,000). Antique brown finish, heavy ornate carvings, hand-painted golden bouquet. Hand-painted golden floral bouquet artwork on tabletop, rich antique brown finish with deep shaded borders, elegantly sculpted gold metallic cabriole legs.
- **Vogue Bloom Console Table** — Rs. 26,000 (Sale from Rs. 30,000). Midnight black silhouette with hand-painted turquoise birds and blooming florals. Textured metallic bronze cabriole legs with elegant curved frame, protective lacquer coating for long-lasting durability.
- **Nautical Azure Console Table** — Rs. 26,000 (Sale from Rs. 30,000). Hand-painted nautical scene of traditional sailing boats and rolling waves. Rich teal deep black artwork with high-gloss lacquer coat, 2 functional drawers with smooth glide for everyday storage.
- **Nova Console Table** — Rs. 26,000 (Sale from Rs. 30,000). Nature-inspired hand-painted scene with graceful birds, blooming spring branches and blossoms. Rich walnut woodgrain surface, 3 functional drawers with hand-painted floral motifs and decorative brasswork.
- **Emperor Noir Console Table** — Rs. 26,000 (Sale from Rs. 30,000). Deep gloss black lacquer finish with ornate gold baroque hardware. Ornamented gold baroque hardware throughout, carved acanthus leaf leg mounts, 2 functional gold-front drawers with antique-style round knobs.

## Why Shopkarro
- **Cash on Delivery**: Pay only when your furniture arrives at your doorstep. No card or online payment needed.
- **Handcrafted Quality**: Every piece is crafted by skilled Pakistani artisans using premium materials.
- **Nationwide Delivery**: We deliver to Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan and 30+ cities across Pakistan.
- **7-Day Returns**: Hassle-free return policy on all orders.
- **Pre-Dispatch Inspection**: Every item is inspected before it leaves our warehouse.
- **Order Tracking**: Real-time order status updates via email and user account dashboard.
- **Artisan Collections**: Hand-painted floral artwork, baroque carvings, nautical scenes, gold metallic finishes — unique pieces not available in regular furniture stores.
- **Skilled Artisans**: Every piece built by skilled Pakistani craftsmen with long-lasting build quality.

## FAQ
- Does Shopkarro offer Cash on Delivery? Yes, COD is available on all orders across Pakistan. No advance payment required.
- Which cities does Shopkarro deliver to? We deliver to Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan and 30+ more cities across Pakistan.
- How long does delivery take? Karachi and Lahore: 2-3 business days. Other major cities: 3-5 business days. Remote areas: 5-7 business days.
- Can I return furniture? Yes, Shopkarro offers 7-day hassle-free returns on all orders.
- Is Shopkarro furniture handcrafted? Yes, all pieces are handcrafted by skilled Pakistani artisans.
- How do I track my order? Log into your account at shopkarro.com/my-orders or check email updates sent after every status change.
- Does Shopkarro sell hand-painted furniture? Yes, Shopkarro specialises in hand-painted console tables and decorative furniture with floral artwork, baroque carvings, nautical scenes and gold metallic finishes.
- What are the console table dimensions? All console tables are 48 inches length, 16 inches width and 32 inches height.
- How much do console tables cost? Console tables are priced between Rs. 26,000 and Rs. 28,000 with Cash on Delivery available.
- Can I contact Shopkarro on WhatsApp? Yes, WhatsApp us at 03706905835 for order assistance.
- What are Shopkarro working hours? Mon-Sat, 9am-6pm PKT.
